docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY MUSKARDIN, MARK AS TO DEFENDANT PEREZ, SAMUEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-25-2013 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

REMARK: FILE IS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED ON 10/14/2025.

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE (FEE FOR SERVICE $35.00) THIS SERVICE WAS UNSUCCESSFUL BECASUE DEFENDANT WAS NOT FOUND. PER TENANT, MR. PEREZ NO LONGER LIVES AT THIS ADDRESS AND HAS MOVED TO NEW YORK. FILED BY PLAINTIFF MUSKARDIN, MARK AS TO DEFENDANT PEREZ, SAMUEL

TRIAL RESET TO DEC-19-2013 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF OCT-25-2013 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
